calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Perdue; Clerk: Clerk S. Ravinantapricha/NBautista; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).
Appearances:
Attorney,
Susan Parkinson, on behalf of the plaintiff John Flanagan.
Defendant, Adrian Coventry is present.
Attorney, Paul Behrend, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, for the premises located on 668 Clay Street, No 47 San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of Nov-23-09 is vacated.
